title: 🧩subworkflow - aws ssm run powershell script on windows ec2 and wait
description:
Subworkflow to execute a PowerShell script on a Windows EC2 instance via SSM Run Command and wait for completion.

Parameters:

instanceId: (Required) EC2 instance ID
powershellScript: (Required) PowerShell script content to execute
awsRegion: (Required) AWS region
dynatraceawsconnection: (Required) Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name
guide:
## 💻 Subworkflow — Run PowerShell on Windows EC2 via SSM

Executes an arbitrary PowerShell script on a Windows EC2 instance via AWS-RunPowerShellScript SSM Run Command and polls until the command reaches a terminal status.

### ⚙️ Parameters
- **instanceId** (Required): EC2 instance ID
- **powershellScript** (Required): PowerShell script to run
- **awsRegion** (Required): AWS region
- **dynatraceawsconnection** (Required): Dynatrace AWS OIDC connection name

send_ps_command.name: send_ps_command
send_ps_command.description: Send PowerShell script to Windows EC2 via SSM Run Command.
